contexts.context: The love of Hermione for <mark>Pyrrhus</mark>,5 founded on ambition, is, again, as...
...Menelaus, king of Sparta, is betrothed to <mark>Pyrrhus</mark>, king of Epirus and son of Achilles....
...brother of Menelaus. Hermione was promised to both <mark>Pyrrhus</mark> and Orestes but ultimately marries Pyrrhus who, much to...
...promised to both Pyrrhus and Orestes but ultimately marries <mark>Pyrrhus</mark> who, much to Hermione's chagrin, also takes  Andomache...
...Andomache as his concubine. Following the death of <mark>Pyrrhus</mark>, Hermione marries Orestes. Back
